description: Install project dependencies and verify the existing project builds successfully before making changes.
steps: Run `npm install` in /projects/sandbox/Workflow-Campaign-Promo to install all dependencies
Run `npm run build` to confirm the existing project builds cleanly without errors
verification: Run `npm run build` in /projects/sandbox/Workflow-Campaign-Promo and confirm exit code 0
findings: npm install and npm run build both succeed. Build compiles successfully with Next.js 14.2.15. There is a deprecation warning about a security vulnerability in next@14.2.15 but it does not affect the build.
